Off Calendar May-29-2024 Continued To Oct-08-24 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Moiton And Motion To Dismiss For Failure To Timely File Proof Of Service
Off Calendar May-10-2024 Denied
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):
Atty. BERWIN COHEN, Esq. of Cohen Edderai LLP (tel: 646-495-1819) for Defendants.
No other appearances made in this matter.

Hearing Re: DEFENDANT CREATIVE INSTALLATIONS, INC. AND KIEHL'S Motion To Dismiss For Failure To Timely File Proof Of Service.

Matter discussed. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Denied without prejudice. The court has been informed that counsel for plaintiff has died. Defendant to comply with CCP 286.

Judge: Rochelle C. East; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (302/RCE)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-20-2024 Continued To Jun-04-24 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Set Aside Order Of Dismissal [Ccp Section 473]
Off Calendar Dec-08-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances (by Zoom):
Berwin Cohen, Esq. 646-807-8543 for Defendant Creative Installations.
No other Appearance.

Argued. The Court did not receive a contest email. Mr Cohen informs the Court they had technical issues yesteday and requests to be heard. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF GOLDEN GATE GLASS & MIRROR CO. INC.'s Motion To Set Aside Order Of Dismissal [CCP Section 473].

Plaintiff Golden Gate & Mirror Co., Inc.'s Motion to Set Aside Order of Dismissal [CCP Section 473], which is unopposed, is GRANTED. The court expresses no view on whether Plaintiff timely served the complaint and summons pursuant to CCP section 583.210 and anticipates that the matter again will be placed on the calendar in the case management department (Department 610) for an OSC on this issue.

Counsel for the prevailing party to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-10-2023 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. Notice having been given and there being no appearance or objection filed, the Court orders the case dismissed pursuant to CCP section 583.210 and CCP section 583.250.
Judge: Anne-Christine Massullo; Clerk: S. Le; Proceedings not reported. (610)
